themes.exampleQuote: A little bit of Paris in Pittsburgh.
The seasonal La Ruche might be the best dessert I have ever had.
It is busy on weekends; you can call ahead if you know what you want.
Travel everywhere, eat anything. This place was the find of Pittsburgh.
Nut and chocolate croissants, a cream puff for later, all fantastic.

notable_quote: The seasonal La Ruche from La Gourmandine might be the best dessert I have ever had.
sentiment_summary: Reviewers return for specific items, the La Ruche, nut croissants, cream puffs, and frame the shop as a genuine Parisian outpost; the only friction surfaces around weekend crowds and uncertainty about whether certain menu items are still available.
quarter_narrative: Nine Pittsburgh creators posted eleven TikToks tagging La Gourmandine this quarter, pulling nearly 32,000 plays without a single post from the bakery itself in the last 41 days. The city is filming the croissant case; the bakery is not filming anything back. Meanwhile, in the broader Pittsburgh Sweets family, Page's holds the top spot this issue on the strength of social momentum, which is exactly the signal La Gourmandine is leaving on the table. The rank climbs when the bakery's own voice reappears, because the review depth and creator magnetism are already doing the structural work.
tldr_read: Dominant review volume, nine creators filming this quarter, and a completely dormant Instagram. Ones to Watch, #1 in Pittsburgh Bakeries, #8 in Pittsburgh Sweets.
tldr_meaning: The review foundation and creator attention are strong enough to hold the bakery rank, but the family rank stays at the floor until Instagram restarts and the bakery begins capturing the attention already circling it.

diagnosis_pullquote.line: Eighth In Sweets, First In Bakeries. Nine Creators Are Filming; The Feed Went Quiet.

playbook.headline: Restart Instagram before the next weekend
playbook.action: The account has been silent for 41 days; one post per week of whatever is in the case that morning closes the momentum gap fast.

playbook.headline: Claim the creator attention already there
playbook.action: Nine creators filmed 11 TikToks this quarter totaling 32,000 plays; reposting one on Instagram Stories each week turns their reach into the bakery's own feed.

playbook.headline: Surface the seasonal menu in photos
playbook.action: The La Ruche prompted the strongest review language this period; a dedicated photo post each time a seasonal item arrives adds to the 779 Google photos already driving discovery.
